Lirik 'Yeye Raya' - Floor 88 & Odda

(Intro)
(Verse 1)
Di rumah sebelah ada jiran macam naga
Asal nampak nak bertengkar buat aku sakit kepala
Sedap betul mulut dia senang senang panggil kita naga
Dua kali lima takut takut terkahwin pula
Tak kuasa aku,bukan dia taste saya
Jangan cakap besar takut takut terjatuh cinta

(Verse 2)
Esok dah nak raya baik buat kuih raya
Baju raya dah siap tempah, tak sabarnya nak beraya
Duit raya pun dah tukar, semangat nya nak beraya
Esok ronda-ronda boleh kita cuci mata
Semua sudah sedia elok kita tidur saja
Jangan jadi orang sebelah solat raya pun membuta
Eh dia tak puas hati apa dia sakit hati sebab tahun lepas punya baju raya sama colour dengan langsir

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Verse 3)
Perut aku pun dah kenyang, habis makan ketupat dan rendang
Tiba tiba sedara datang, minta tolong hantarkan lemang
Kenapa raya pertama,waktu ini nak rosak pula
Nak mintak tolong,tolong,tolong pada siapa
Sedihnya aku rasa beginikah kisahnya
Kenapalah raya pertama
Nasib malang bertimpa timpa

(Verse 4)
Alamak ada perempuan, dok termenung di tepi jalan
Rupa rupa jiran sebelah, sakit hati malas nak layan
Tak sampai pula hati ini,nak tinggal dia kesorangan
Awak nak pergi mana mari abang hantarkan
Malu ku selama ini,hari hari gaduh dengannya
Eh kenapa hati ini, terasa berbunga bunga
Jemputlah malam nanti, ajaklah teman temanmu
Datang beraya rumah ku,bersama ayah dan ibu

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna
Raya mari kita semua bergembira,
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Outro)
Dengan teman,ibu bapa sanak saudara
Minta ampun kemaafan sesama kita
Selamat Hari Raya

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

snippet.title: BTS: THE RETURN | Documentary | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
BTS: THE RETURN, a Netflix Documentary. Follow the long-awaited comeback of pop royalty, BTS. Get unprecedented access to the seven members’ journey of doubt, laughter, and rediscovery as they return to the studio, create new music, and begin the comeback of the decade! From acclaimed director Bao Nguyen (The Stringer, The Greatest Night in Pop) and producers This Machine (Martha, Karol G) and HYBE.

BTS: The Return - Only on Netflix, March 27

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82158609

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

BTS: THE RETURN | Documentary | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

They're back! BTS gathers in LA to record their album "Arirang" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
I’ll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn’t climb
It's crazy but it’s true. There’s nothing I won't do. 
I’d risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
I’m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart’s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb

It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do
I’d risk it all for you (2x)

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Shop Bruno’s official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore

Connect with Bruno: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars
https://www.instagram.com/brunomars
https://www.youtube.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #OfficialMusicVideo
